title: The Government Rewrites the Story
description: On pages 19, 20, 21, 22, this part focuses on alabasta learns the truth. The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
scene: This scene belongs to the Alabasta Learns the Truth sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, King Cobra, Smoker, Tashigi.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Sanji! You know what to do, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: We don't have any time left!

summary: The kingdom begins sorting through what happened, while the Straw Hats remain hidden and the World Government moves to control the official story.
